mapper.sql: id, sku, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, hs_code, hs_description, origin_country, destination_country, source_location, exemption, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM customs_products_list WHERE sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN sku = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN sku LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, sku LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM customs_products_list WHERE sku = #{sku} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO customs_products_list (sku, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, hs_code, hs_description, origin_country, destination_country, source_location, exemption, is_tax) VALUES
(#{p.sku}, #{p.descriptionCn}, #{p.model}, #{p.unit}, #{p.unitPriceUsd}, #{p.currency}, #{p.singleWeight}, #{p.hsCode}, #{p.hsDescription}, #{p.originCountry}, #{p.destinationCountry}, #{p.sourceLocation}, #{p.exemption}, #{p.isTax})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description_cn = VALUES(description_cn), model = VALUES(model), unit = VALUES(unit), unit_price_usd = VALUES(unit_price_usd), currency = VALUES(currency), single_weight = VALUES(single_weight), hs_code = VALUES(hs_code), hs_description = VALUES(hs_description), origin_country = VALUES(origin_country), destination_country = VALUES(destination_country), source_location = VALUES(source_location), exemption = VALUES(exemption), is_tax = VALUES(is_tax), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO customs_products_list (sku, source_location, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, origin_country, destination_country, hs_code, hs_description, exemption, is_tax) SELECT od.sku, IF(il.product_code IS NOT NULL, REPLACE(REPLACE( IF(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', '') REGEXP '[（(]', SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', ''), '(', '（'), ')', '）'), '（', -1), ''), '）', ''), ')', ''), ''), IFNULL(il.product_name, ''), '无型号', IFNULL(il.unit, ''), IF(il.tax_included_price IS NOT NULL AND il.tax_included_price REGEXP '^[0-9.]+(/[0-9.]+)*$', CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(il.tax_included_price, '/', -1) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0), IFNULL(NULLIF(od.tariffs_currency_unit, ''), 'USD'), IFNULL(od.cg_box_weight, 0), '中国', IFNULL(w.name, ''), IFNULL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(TRIM(IFNULL(il.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+'), ''), TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(IFNULL(il.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+[[:space:]]*', '')), '照章', IFNULL(po.is_tax, 0) FROM overseas_stock_order_detail od LEFT JOIN customs_inventory_list il ON REPLACE(od.product_code, 'JMH-', '') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = REPLACE(il.sku, 'JMH', '') LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON od.r_wid = w.wid LEFT JOIN purchase_order po ON od.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = po.item_sku WHERE od.product_code LIKE 'JMH-%' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_location = VALUES(source_location), description_cn = VALUES(description_cn), unit_price_usd = VALUES(unit_price_usd), model = VALUES(model), unit = VALUES(unit), currency = VALUES(currency), single_weight = VALUES(single_weight), destination_country = VALUES(destination_country), exemption = VALUES(exemption), is_tax = VALUES(is_tax), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT IGNORE INTO customs_products_list (sku, source_location, description_cn, model, unit, unit_price_usd, currency, single_weight, origin_country, destination_country, hs_code, hs_description, exemption, is_tax) SELECT src.sku, src.source_location, IFNULL(NULLIF(src.product_name, ''), ''), '无型号', IFNULL(src.unit, ''), IF(src.tax_included_price IS NOT NULL AND src.tax_included_price REGEXP '^[0-9.]+(/[0-9.]+)*$', CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(src.tax_included_price, '/', -1) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0), 'USD', IFNULL(src.single_weight, 0), '中国', src.country_name, IFNULL(REGEXP_SUBSTR(TRIM(IFNULL(src.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+'), ''), TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(IFNULL(src.declaration_elements, '')), '^[0-9]+[[:space:]]*', '')), '照章', 0 FROM ( SELECT b.sku, COALESCE(NULLIF(il.product_name, ''), NULLIF(b.product_name, '')) AS product_name, il.unit, il.tax_included_price, il.declaration_elements, IF(il.product_code IS NOT NULL, REPLACE(REPLACE( IF(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', '') REGEXP '[（(]', SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(il.product_code, '\n', ''), '(', '（'), ')', '）'), '（', -1), ''), '）', ''), ')', ''), '') AS source_location, IF(b.box_weight IS NOT NULL AND b.box_weight REGEXP '^[0-9.]+$', CAST(b.box_weight AS DECIMAL(10,4)), 0) AS single_weight, CASE UPPER(IFNULL(s.ship_to_country_code, '')) WHEN 'DE' THEN '德国' WHEN 'US' THEN '美国' WHEN 'GB' THEN '英国' WHEN 'UK' THEN '英国' WHEN 'ES' THEN '西班牙' WHEN 'CN' THEN '中国' WHEN 'FR' THEN '法国' WHEN 'PL' THEN '波兰' WHEN 'IT' THEN '意大利' ELSE IFNULL(s.ship_to_country_code, '') END AS country_name FROM amz_fba_shipment_box b INNER JOIN ( SELECT sku, MIN(id) AS id FROM amz_fba_shipment_box WHERE sku IS NOT NULL AND sku != '' GROUP BY sku ) pick ON b.id = pick.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT il1.* FROM customs_inventory_list il1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT sku, MIN(id) AS id FROM customs_inventory_list WHERE sku IS NOT NULL AND sku != '' GROUP BY sku ) il_pick ON il1.id = il_pick.id ) il ON b.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = il.sku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN amz_fba_shipment s ON b.shipment_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = s.shipment_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) src WHERE src.sku IS NOT NULL AND src.sku != ''
